_comment: SCORED profile B2 — Group B ambiguity. Three owners with vague/heterogeneous commission language; no direct channel. Serialized verbatim from docs/planning-artifacts/poc-respondent-specs-2026-06-02.md (v1.2-frozen) §Group B / B2.

owners.split_terms: Owner receives 75% of revenue after OTA/channel fees are deducted

facts.pain: Explaining to owners why their payouts are different every month.

persona: Conversational and warm. Gives approximate figures ('around,' 'I think,' 'about'). When pushed for exact numbers, admits some uncertainty and provides ranges or says 'let me check my contract.' For Owner 3 (Chris Lim), is genuinely vague: 'We have a verbal agreement — he gets 75% of whatever comes in after the OTA takes their cut.' Does not volunteer information proactively; the agent must ask for each owner in sequence.
_note: S5 NOT surfaced (no direct channel). owners aggregate recorded:3_owners; per-owner: Pat ~18% commission, Diane ~$180 flat, Chris 75% revenue_split — all recorded approximate + flag_for_call_1. KEY EVAL CRITERION: at most one clarifying question per owner; record approximates for Pat/Diane; for Chris, extract the specific 75% via one follow-up (not 'most of it'). ownership_model normalized to canonical schema enum 'all_managed_for_others' (spec v1.3). Spec answer key is partial (hero slots only); facts carry full ground truth.
